assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddSigningCredential with the new key (from LoadNewKey()) and SecurityAlgorithms.RsaSha256
assertions.rationale: Calls idsvrBuilder.AddSigningCredential(newKey, SecurityAlgorithms.RsaSha256) where newKey = LoadNewKey().

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddValidationKey with the old key (from LoadOldKey()) and SecurityAlgorithms.RsaSha256
assertions.rationale: Calls idsvrBuilder.AddValidationKey(oldKey, SecurityAlgorithms.RsaSha256) where oldKey = LoadOldKey().

assertions.assertion: AddSigningCredential is called with the NEW key (not the old key), and AddValidationKey is called with the OLD key (not the new key)
assertions.rationale: AddSigningCredential uses newKey from LoadNewKey(), AddValidationKey uses oldKey from LoadOldKey().
